name: cwms-tools
description: Agent-friendly tools (MCP server and CLI) for the USACE Corps Water Management System (CWMS) Data API.

api_root.title: CWMS Data API root URL
api_root.description: Base URL for the USACE CWMS Data API. Override only to target a mirror or test endpoint.

operator_email.title: Operator contact email
operator_email.description: Optional contact address advertised in the API User-Agent so the data provider can reach you. Leave blank to omit.

tools.name: cwms_get_overview_section
tools.description: Read one section of the bundled CWMS orientation document.

tools.name: cwms_search_places
tools.description: Resolve a CWMS place name to ranked location matches.

tools.name: cwms_describe_place
tools.description: Read everything about one place in a single call.

tools.name: cwms_list_parameters
tools.description: List the parameters published at a location, grouped by publisher.

tools.name: cwms_browse_region
tools.description: Browse the locations published by one office, optionally filtered.

tools.name: cwms_get_value
tools.description: Latest observation for a parameter at a place.

tools.name: cwms_get_history
tools.description: Read observations across a bounded time window.

tools.name: cwms_publishers_for_parameter
tools.description: List the publishers reporting a parameter, with explicit coverage.
